---
title: "Jenny Chen"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: profile.jpg
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 15em
  links: 
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/Jenny77qq
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:chen52@stolaf.edu
---

## About Me

I am a student at St. Olaf College.

### Education
- **St. Olaf College** - Statistics and Data Science / Computer Science

### Skills
- R, Python, C++
- Data visualization (ggplot2, plotly)
- Statistical analysis

### Interests
- Data visualization
- Text analysis
- Geospatial analysis
